context_notes: Milestone v0.0.1 is functionally complete and audit-passed; these two are non-blocking findings the audit surfaced. Neither affects correctness. Working tree clean at 2d4e940 (= origin/gsd/v0.0.1-greenfield-rebuild). The heavy lesson from this milestone: CI-only behaviors (background-step semantics, cross-OS lockfile, cross-job cache) pass every local gate and only fail on a real main push -- if A1's cleanup touches dependencies or the lockfile, regenerate the lockfile in a linux/arm64 node:24 container (see the windows-npm-install-prunes-linux-optional-deps memory).
